scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.start: npm run db:migrate && cd server && node index.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.postinstall: npm run install:all && npm run build
